commands.name: claim
commands.meaning: Central idea the scene tries to teach.

commands.name: derive
commands.meaning: Computed value from state or other values.

commands.name: relation
commands.meaning: Typed semantic edge that can be indexed.

commands.name: mark
commands.meaning: Visual sign bound to meaning, data, or state.

commands.name: rule
commands.meaning: Condition that changes feedback or emphasis.

constraints: visual authority must not imply epistemic authority
claim-bearing scenes can reference claim and evidence records
generated scenes remain patch proposals and preserve uncertainty/disagreement cues
defer_note: Do not implement before Electron Workbench daily-use loop is functional.
truth_evidence_note: A scene explains or arranges claims; it does not independently verify them. Claim/evidence status remains file-backed and inspectable through the Truth Lens.
